# Omni-Compress

> Smart-routing media compression for browsers and Node.js.

Omni-Compress automatically routes media compression to the fastest available engine at runtime: native Web APIs (OffscreenCanvas), FFmpeg WebAssembly, or OS-level ffmpeg binaries. It features zero main-thread blocking, zero-copy memory transfers, AbortSignal cancellation, and built-in ZIP archiving.

## v2.0 API (recommended)
```typescript
import { compressImage, compressAudio, archive, detectFormat } from '@dharanish/omni-compress';

// Image compression — returns CompressResult { blob, originalSize, compressedSize, ratio, format }
// Note: AVIF uses @jsquash/avif (standalone libaom-av1 Wasm) — no extra setup needed.
const { blob, ratio } = await compressImage(file, {
  format: 'webp',          // 'webp' | 'avif' | 'jpeg' | 'png'
  quality: 0.8,            // 0.0–1.0
  maxWidth: 1920,          // optional
  signal: controller.signal // optional — AbortSignal for cancellation
});

// Audio compression
const { blob: audio } = await compressAudio(file, {
  format: 'opus',          // 'opus' | 'mp3' | 'flac' | 'wav' | 'aac'
  bitrate: '96k',          // optional
  signal: controller.signal
});

// ZIP archive (isomorphic — works in browser and Node.js)
const { blob: zip } = await archive([
  { name: 'photo.webp', data: blob },
  { name: 'audio.opus', data: audio }
]);

// Magic byte format detection
const format = detectFormat(await file.arrayBuffer()); // e.g. 'webp', 'flac', null
```

## Deprecated v1.x API
```typescript
// OmniCompressor.process() still works but returns a raw Blob (no size metadata).
// Migrate to compressImage() / compressAudio() for CompressResult.
import { OmniCompressor } from '@dharanish/omni-compress';
const blob = await OmniCompressor.process(file, { type: 'image', format: 'webp' });
```

## Full Documentation
For the complete API reference, architecture details, supported formats, and playground design philosophy, please read the full documentation at:
[https://dharanish-v.github.io/omni-compress/llms-full.txt](https://dharanish-v.github.io/omni-compress/llms-full.txt)
